title: plagiobothrys foliaceus
intro: Plagiobothrys foliaceus, also known as Fremont's leaved plagiobothrys or leafy false broomweed, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys foliaceus include its potential to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Plagiobothrys foliaceus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
